title: Who May File. Any person, natural or juridical, who is aggrieved by the
content: 45 commission of an offense as enumerated in these Rules may file a complaint. 46 47 For this purpose, an aggrieved person is one who is prejudiced by the commission of any 48 act amounting to recruitment violation or grounds for disciplinary action. 49 50 The Department may initiate a complaint based on duly substantiated reports of violation 51 of these Rules and other issuances on overseas employment. The report shall state 52 clearly the facts constituting the offense, accompanied by all available evidence and/or 53 supporting documents relative thereto. The same shall be referred to the Adjudication 54 Bureau for evaluation and/or determination of the appropriate venue. 55 56
